title: brunfelsia burchellii
intro: Brunfelsia burchellii, also known as the Yesterday, Today and Tomorrow plant due to its flowers changing color from white to pink to purple over the course of the day, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Brunfelsia burchellii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
